description_long: This is a high-top athletic sneaker featuring a combination of dark blue, light blue, and brown panels with a matte and slightly grippy finish. The upper is constructed from layered synthetic materials and mesh, with a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The shoe has a robust, sculpted black rubber sole with pronounced geometric shapes and a raised midsole for added support and style. The lacing system is a standard criss-cross style with dark laces threading through reinforced eyelets. The interior appears cushioned, and the heel includes a pull tab for easy wearing. No visible logos or brand markings are present, and the shoe appears to be in new condition.
description: A high-top sneaker with layered blue and brown panels, a sculpted black sole, and standard criss-cross lacing. The shoe has a matte, grippy finish and appears new.
description_view_0: Side view showing the layered blue and brown panels, sculpted black sole, and the full profile of the shoe.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the padded tongue, standard criss-cross lacing, and the rounded toe box.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same layered design and sole structure, with the lacing and collar visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the padded collar, heel pull tab, and the back structure of the sole.
